staleness_policy: If snapshot is more than 30 days old, warn the user and suggest they re-install the skill or check the live site for current data. Subscription quotas and local hardware prices change slowly; API prices change a few times a year; benchmark definitions are near-static.
notes: Subscription quotas marked estimated:true are extrapolated, not measured. Confidence 'low' means the number is a rough estimate and should be caveated.

Benchmark scores are raw per-benchmark values. To produce a single 'quality' number, see the quality-score recipe in SKILL.md (z-score normalization across arena_text, arena_code, and aa_intelligence).
Internal model keys (e.g. 'claude-opus-4') are stable identifiers. Display names are in the 'name' field — always use .name for user-facing output.
